title: IIPS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
shortInfo: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) Senior Research Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIPS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Ph.D. in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences OR M.Phil. in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences with one-year experience in Demographic and/or Health related research are eligible to apply for these Senior Research Officer vacancies. The Walk-

basic_details.job_title: IIPS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) Senior Research Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIPS Senior Research Officer Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Ph.D. in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences OR M.Phil. in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences with one-year experience in Demographic and/or Health related research are eligible to apply for these Senior Research Officer vacancies. The Walk-

qualification.details: Ph.D. degree submitted/awarded in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences OR M.Phil. degree in Demography/Population Studies/Any other Social Sciences and one-year experience of working in Demographic and/or Health related research. Desirable: Experience in qualitative research; Experience in handling secondary data of Census, NSSO and NFHS.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this IIPS recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Senior Research Officer.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Officer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 29 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D. or M.Phil. degree in Demography/Population Studies/Social Sciences with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 70,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at International Institute for Population Sciences, Mumbai, Maharashtra, 400088.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the interview?
faq.answer: Carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type is Contractual.
